---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new for Claudio
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the gap or friction you're experiencing with Claudio today.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Additional context

Screenshots, examples, or links that help explain the idea.

---

_Keep in mind Claudio is intentionally local-first and lightweight. Features that require cloud services, authentication, or heavy dependencies are unlikely to be accepted._
